entries.title: Help Center | PawPal
h1: Help that keeps pet safety moving.

headings.text: Help that keeps pet safety moving.

firstViewportText: SupportHelp that keeps pet safety moving.Quick guidance for NFC safety tags, finder pages, account access, community activity, and PawPal support routes.Contact supportOpen GlobeSupport routePick the right laneTag scanPublic rescue pageAccountEmail + affected screenSafetyLocal services firstNFC tag or pet profileIf a tag scan does not open the expected pet profile, check the tag ID and owner lost-mode settings.Finder page, QR/NFC, lost modeAccount and communityFor sign-in, posting, chat, or moderation questions, include your account email and the affected screen.Login, posts, chat, moderationSafety or urgent pet issueFor urgent rescue or safety situations, contact local services first, then use PawPal to notify the owner or community.Owner alerts, nearby help, rescueInclude the pet tag ID, account email, and screenshots when possible.That gives the team enough context to trace the correct profile, order, or map event without exposing unnecessary data.Belgium-first support
